on the incredible true story that inspired moby dick,in the winter of 1820, the new england whaling ship essex was assaulted by something no one could believe: a whale of mammoth size and will, and an almost human sense of vengeance  the real-life maritime disaster would inspire herman melville’s moby dick  but that told only half the story  “heart of the sea” reveals the encounter’s harrowing
